operational_scenes.scene_title: AUV Tote Removal and Reinitialization Process
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain procedure for removing and reinitializing AUV totes
operational_intents: Describe removing AUV and sending go to function
Explain tote drop and reinitialization at hospital
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by tote removal and reinitialization steps
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational process on tote handling

operational_scenes.scene_title: Container Selection and Rack Color Coding
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Identify container selection and rack color meanings
operational_intents: Describe color coding for tote presence
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Group content on container selection and rack status
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Coherent topic on rack and container identification

operational_scenes.scene_title: Tote Association and Rack Verification Procedures
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain tote association with AGVs and rack verification
operational_intents: Describe tote left on stand but associated to AGV
Explain rack color and tote ID verification
Outline finding tote location by ID
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by tote association and rack verification steps
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focused on tote-AGV and rack verification processes

operational_scenes.scene_title: Labeling and Map Properties of Racks and Robots
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe labeling system and map properties for racks and robots
operational_intents: Explain labels on totes, robots, and rack positions
Discuss node codes and layer counts
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Group content on labeling and map property explanations
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Unified topic on system labeling and mapping

operational_scenes.scene_title: Map Object Selection and Information Display
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain map object selection and corresponding information display
operational_intents: Describe selecting objects on map by type
Explain information shown for AGVs, racks, chargers
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by map interaction and object selection explanation
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational topic on map usage

operational_scenes.scene_title: System Access Controls and Removal Warnings
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss system access controls and warnings for removals
operational_intents: Explain risks of removing AGVs improperly
Outline warning mechanisms on removal actions
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Group content on access control and removal warnings
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Coherent topic on system security and safety
